short.en: Agile/Scrum sprint management plugin for GLPI with item linking, capacity tracking, and meeting management
short.nl: Agile/Scrum sprint management plugin voor GLPI met item koppelingen, capaciteitsbeheer en vergaderingenbeheer
short.fr: Plugin de gestion de sprints Agile/Scrum pour GLPI avec liaison d'elements, suivi de capacite et gestion de reunions
short.es: Plugin de gestion de sprints Agile/Scrum para GLPI con vinculacion de elementos, seguimiento de capacidad y gestion de reuniones

long.en:
SprintManager is a comprehensive Agile/Scrum management plugin for GLPI.
Features: - Create and manage sprints with configurable duration, goals, and status tracking - Sprint backlog with story points, priority, status, and capacity per item - Link existing GLPI Tickets, Changes, and Project Tasks directly to sprint items - Team member management with roles (Scrum Master, Product Owner, Developer, Tester, etc.) - Capacity tracking per member with visual overload detection - Sprint templates with pre-defined members and backlog items - Meeting management: kickoff, daily standup, review, retrospective - Interactive standup review: update item status, owner, and notes during meetings - Treated checkbox to mark discussed items during standups - Dashboard with progress visualization, stats cards, and team capacity overview - Full GLPI rights and entity integration - Multi-language support: English, Dutch, French, Spanish
